summary: The page reproduces all 11 sections in the correct order with strong text fidelity and all required EDS signature classes present, and the overall pixel-match is 91.7%. The most impactful issues are oversized card/icon images (icons rendered ~3x design size), missing video player control SVGs, header font-size/weight and logo alignment mismatches, and ISI text sizes/colors that deviate from spec.

issues.expected: Play icon (svg_I68226-5178-1-683.svg), mute/settings/fullscreen controls (svg_I68226-5178-1-700/703/708.svg) plus 01:00 timestamp overlaid on the video
issues.actual: Only the video poster image is rendered; all four control SVGs and the '01:00' / 'Play' text are missing
issues.fix: Add the four control SVGs and the 01:00 timecode as an overlay within the eds-video container

issues.actual: Icons render at ~309px wide (3x oversized); .epc-card .card-img img uses width:auto/height:auto so SVG/PNG inflate
issues.fix: Constrain card-img img to the manifest pixel sizes
Set explicit width/height matching the manifest for the card2 images
Set .epc-mainnav-list a to font-size:20px and ensure weight 600 actually applies
Reduce epc-isi font sizes to 15px and set body color to #000000
Apply container max-width/padding so logo aligns to ~155px
Adjust top-links container width/alignment to match design x positions
Left-align footer logo to ~275px per design
Apply bold weight to the What is EPCLUSA heading

issues.expected: Icons centered at design x positions (231/436/617/828/980)
issues.fix: Correct card column gutters/centering to match design layout
